{{Quote|Think gundarks, but meaner.|[[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]]|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service]]''</ref>}}
The '''Irrukiine''' were four-armed sentients indigenous to [[Malrev IV]]. They were sometimes referred to as Irks.

They are believed to have been influenced greatly by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Temple hidden within the forests of Malrev IV. They developed a strong sense of ownership over the temple, attacking anything that entered the vicinity of the ancient structure. However, a being who learned how to wield the Sith magic that emanated from the temple would have been able to manipulate them, such as the mad [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Cartariun]]. He armed them with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] for ground assaults and even motivated them to fly [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] in aerial combat. Even under Cartariun's control, the Irrukiine retained their volatile nature.

{{Species-stub}}
